name: Release / Storefront Packaging Specialist
description: Owns release packaging, public asset artifacts, itch/storefront readiness, final build evidence, and release blockers for Locksmith. Ensures every release is publication-ready with correct pdxinfo, launcher images, release notes, screenshots, and trailer coordination.

skills.name: Release Packaging
skills.description: Verifies and assembles release artifacts: pdxinfo metadata, launcher images, release notes, screenshots, and build evidence for Locksmith publication readiness.
examples: Prepare Locksmith for release: verify pdxinfo, launcher assets, and build evidence.
Check itch.io page readiness for Locksmith, handle legacy Safe Cracker URL migration.
Generate release notes from recent git changes and completed TODO items.

skills.name: Storefront Readiness Audit
skills.description: Audits itch.io page and storefront assets for completeness: description, tags, screenshots, launcher art, and release status. Identifies blockers before publication.
examples: Audit Locksmith itch.io page: check description, tags, screenshots, status.
Identify release blockers before publishing Locksmith update.
